_comment: FrugalGPT v2 predictive routing tunables (RULE #1 - out of the binary). job_needs = per-artifactType output headroom + capability needs (folded into the context-window hard gate). viability = first-pick quality floors + per-tier difficulty multipliers + the empirical sample floor. Floors are compared against prior*difficultyMultiplier, so they MUST be reachable (e.g. coding.L3 0.50 with L3 mult 0.6 needs prior>=0.83). The Swift binary carries identical _fallback_only defaults; edit + git push + refreshMchataisourceCache ships with no rebuild. Keys prefixed _ are category fallbacks used when artifactType is unknown.

progress_monitor._comment: R0 build-progress gate for the auto-fix loop. max_cycles = high ceiling reached ONLY while each cycle keeps lowering the error count; stuck_patience = consecutive no-progress cycles tolerated before stopping (1 = stop the first cycle that fails to beat the best error count, matching today's flat 2-cycle aggressiveness for stuck builds while letting productive runs cook up to max_cycles). Binary carries identical _fallback_only defaults; clamped max_cycles 1..20, stuck_patience 1..10.
